description: 单元测试套件，纯 pytest，无外部依赖。每个源文件对应 1 个 test_*.py，覆盖前缀常量、编/解码 roundtrip、恶意/异常输入降级、payload 字段完整性、WSType 常量与 parse 错误路径。

key_classes_functions.name: test_prefix_constants
key_classes_functions.purpose: 断言 4 个前缀常量字面值

key_classes_functions.name: test_parse_malformed_*_falls_back_to_plain
key_classes_functions.purpose: 3 个 malformed 用例（msg/edit/sys 无冒号或坏 JSON）降级 plain

key_classes_functions.name: test_encode_msg_text_with_colon
key_classes_functions.purpose: text 含冒号时只取首个冒号做分隔

key_classes_functions.name: test_parse_known_types
key_classes_functions.purpose: 6 种已知 WSType 都能通过 parse

key_classes_functions.name: test_parse_invalid_type_raises_typeerror
key_classes_functions.purpose: 非 str/dict 输入抛 TypeError
